projectName: NeuroVault: ZK-Verified AI Model Integrity for Autonomous Trading
hackathon: AI Trading Agents ERC-8004 | lablab.ai | $55,000 SURGE token | deadline April 12 2026
description: NeuroVault builds upon the existing ERC-8004 Evolution framework but introduces a novel ZK-Verified Model Integrity layer. Unlike previous builds that verify trade execution (AutoTradeX) or liquidity (LiquiAgent), NeuroVault verifies the *source of truth* for the agent's decision-making. The system uses a Circom circuit to generate a zero-knowledge proof that the agent's inference weights match a registered on-chain hash, ensuring the strategy hasn't been tampered with. This is critical for DeFi
angle: First implementation of Proof-of-Model-Fidelity (PoMF) to verify AI trading agent weights haven't been adversarially modified without revealing the model itself.
